pr.title: [WIP] Int6 + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window (est. val_bpb ~1.160)

output.summary: Combines wider MLP, int6 quantized weights with FP16 tied embeddings, and sliding-window eval to target ~1.160 val_bpb pending the 8xH100 run.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Uses standard training with validation evaluation; not val-only.
techniques: - int6+zstd per-row quantization for MLP/attention weights
- FP16 tied embedding passthrough to shrink quant gap
